questionHtml: Outline the relationship between ambient daily temperature and food intake in March.
markschemeHtml:
1. food intake rises as daily temperature increases / positive correlation;
  2. the lowest food intake corresponds to the lowest temperature;

meta.title: Outline the relationship between ambient daily temperature and food intake in March.

D3.3.2. Negative feedback loops in homeostasis
